response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and a passion for open-source projects, but his experience lacks depth in the core requirements for this role: C++ programming, large-scale distributed systems, and cloud compute platform leadership. His background is more aligned with web, mobile, and developer tooling rather than the specialized infrastructure focus of this position.
strengths: Diverse technical experience across multiple domains (web, mobile, desktop, embedded) and languages, showcasing adaptability.
Strong open-source contributions and mentorship, including workshops and talks, indicating leadership potential.
Proven ability to work on complex systems (e.g., GISCollective, real-time data integration at Sociomantic) and optimize performance.
concerns: Lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience; most recent work is in TypeScript, Node.js, and other languages.
Limited direct experience with large-scale cloud compute platforms or distributed systems as specified in the job description.
No explicit evidence of leading technical strategy for infrastructure or cloud platforms in a formal leadership role.
